dataset_name: Accident and Emergency Attendances and Emergency Admissions

hints.entry_structure: Sub-pages are organized by fiscal year (for example 2026-27 and 2025-26) under ae-attendances-and-emergency-admissions-YYYY-YY paths.
hints.publication_date: Publication dates appear in page metadata and monthly release pages. Files follow pattern Monthly-AE-[Month]-[Year].csv.
hints.subject_period: Subject period is monthly and extracted from filenames and release dates. Files cover May 2024 onwards.

samples.notes: Monthly CSV files. Subject period inferred from filename pattern Monthly-AE-[Month]-[Year].csv. Fiscal-year-organized pages.

hints.month_extraction: Month and year are embedded in filename
